heroHeadline: Hegseth Declares US Victory; White House Holds Nuclear Red Line as Ceasefire Holds
heroSubtitle: Defense Secretary Hegseth proclaimed US victory in the Iran war on April 8 while the White House reaffirmed Trump's red line against Iranian nuclear enrichment — signaling the ceasefire is conditional, not a resolution. Iranians expressed public relief as all sides claimed victory.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-08. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com.
